name: AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base Successful Deletion Detection
description: Detected successful deletion attempts of an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base, potentially suggesting either a planned removal or an unauthorized action. The impact of this event includes the permanent loss of valuable information stored within the knowledge base, which can disrupt the AI model service.

rules.name: AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base Listing Detection
AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base Successful Deletion Detection

author: Sunil Bharti
